scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "bun run dev:server" "bun run dev:web"
scripts.dev:otel: concurrently -n tempo,loki,prom,otelcol,grafana,server,web -c yellow,magenta,cyan,blue,red,green,white "tempo -config.file=./infra/tempo.yaml" "loki -config.file=./infra/loki.yaml" "prometheus --config.file=./infra/prometheus.yaml --storage.tsdb.path=.otel/prometheus-data" "otelcol-contrib --config=./infra/otel-collector.yaml" "grafana server -homepath $GRAFANA_HOME -config ./infra/grafana/grafana.ini" "bun run dev:server" "bun run dev:web"
scripts.check: tsc --project packages/shared/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc --project packages/github-app/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc --project packages/github-graphql/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc --project packages/buildkite/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc --project packages/server/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc --project packages/web/tsconfig.json --noEmit
